  "decision": "fail",

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Sawcut joints were executed too late, resulting in random cracking (FD) across the slab."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Document the location and extent of the random cracking.",
    "Consult with the structural engineer of record to determine if epoxy injection, gravity-feed resin, or slab replacement is required.",
    "Review and adjust the sawcutting schedule for subsequent pours to ensure joints are cut as soon as the concrete can support the saw without raveling."
  ],
  "rationale": "The sawcut joints were not placed within the critical window before internal shrinkage stresses exceeded the tensile strength of the concrete, leading to uncontrolled random cracking. This violates the intent of ACI 302.1R regarding jointing timing and compromises the structural and serviceability integrity of the industrial slab.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 302.1R",
    "ACI 308R"
  ]
}
